intent: self-test — prove the comprehend->digest->brief path end-to-end on a small local target

visualisations.title: Watchtower Board — architecture layers
visualisations.shows: View/HTTP server (server.mjs) over parse+staleness helpers (parse-concepts.mjs) over read-only data sources (engine dirs, backlog/concepts.md, git, tmux) — a stateless viewer that owns no state

visualisations.title: Modules of the board
visualisations.shows: three Node modules with role + size: server.mjs (view+HTTP, 330L), parse-concepts.mjs (md-table->lanes parser, 107L), selfcheck-converge.mjs (converge self-check, 50L)

visualisations.title: concepts.md -> Concept Lanes view
visualisations.shows: backlog/concepts.md -> parseConcepts() -> attachStaleness() (git-blame committer-time vs STALE_DAYS=14) -> rendered Concept Lanes on :7430

visualisations.title: Board 14-day change story (v1 -> v5)
visualisations.shows: v1 minimal live board -> v2 Concept Lanes -> v3 idea-staleness -> v4 Floor<->Lanes bridge + standing reaper -> v5 converge bridge + reaper keys off done/
